data.title: 1.10M Ethereum scooped up by whales—What do they know that we don’t?
data.description:
Ethereum whales accumulated 1.10 million ETH, sparking speculation about a potential market shift or breakout.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/1-10m-ethereum-scooped-up-by-whales-what-do-they-know-that-we-dont/

data.title: Crypto Activities Are Now Open to US Banks
data.description:
The U.S. Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC) now allows national banks to engage in crypto activities without prior regulatory approval.
source: https://coincu.com/325638-crypto-activities-are-now-open-to-us-banks

data.title: Whales Acquire Over 30,000 BTC in Recent Weeks
data.description: According to Odaily, on-chain analyst Ali reported on the X platform that whales have purchased more than 30,000 BTC over the past two weeks.

data.title: Kraken Exchange Prepares for IPO in the First Quarter of 2026
data.description:
Kraken exchange is preparing to go public as early as Q1 2026, aiming to become the second publicly traded U.S. crypto exchange after Coinbase.
source: https://coincu.com/325627-kraken-exchange-prepares-for-ipo

data.title: Analyst: Whales bought more than 30,000 BTC in the past two weeks
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: On-chain analyst Ali wrote on the X platform that whales have purchased more than 30,000 BTC in the past two weeks.

Ethereum’s fractal hints at 2017-like rally: Odds of it happening are…
data.description:
Ethereum could be on its way to similar 2017 gains as whales continue to buy ETH during the current market dip.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/ethereums-fractal-hints-at-2017-like-rally-odds-of-it-happening-are/

data.title: Sam Bankman-Fried Placed In Solitary Confinement After Unauthorized Interview
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Sam Bankman-Fried, commonly known as SBF, has been placed in solitary confinement following an unauthorized interview with Tucker Carlson. This development was reported on March 8 by Cointlegraph. The interview, which took place without permission, has led to this disciplinary action.

data.title: OCC Eases Crypto Regulations, Allowing Banks to Engage Without Prior Approval
data.description:
The post OCC Eases Crypto Regulations, Allowing Banks to Engage Without Prior Approval appeared first on Coinpedia Fintech News
The U.S. regulator overseeing national banks provided clarification on Friday that federally regulated banks can now engage in various cryptocurrency activities without needing prior approval.  In its new interpretive letter, the OCC clarified that national banks and...
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/occ-eases-crypto-regulations-allowing-banks-to-engage-without-prior-approval/

data.title: Binance Whales Cash Out as Bitcoin Drops—More Downside Ahead?
data.description:
Bitcoin’s price has once again turned bearish after briefly recovering to $94,000 on Monday. Notably, the cryptocurrency had shown signs of strength earlier this week following a period of decline, but the recovery was short-lived. As of today, Bitcoin slipped below $90,000, marking a 1.8% decrease in the past 24 hours. According to CryptoQuant analyst Crazzyblockk, one key factor contributing...
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/binance-whales-cash-out-as-bitcoin-drops-more-downside-ahead/
